title: Devi Sahasranama
intro: A sacred composition of 1000 names of the Divine Mother, celebrating her infinite power and cosmic manifestations.
description:
The Devi Sahasranama is a powerful devotional text that honors the Divine Mother through 1000 sacred names. Each name represents a unique aspect of her divine energy and protective grace.

|| Opening ||
Ya Devi Vishnurupa Tanu, Amba Brahmi Sarasvatih.
Aradhya Devi Sahasra Nama, Devya Ashesa Jagadguru.

Commonly recited during Durga Puja and Navratri celebrations.
meaning: The Devi Sahasranama acknowledges the Divine Mother as the ultimate source of all energy and creation. It celebrates her role as both protector and liberator.

faq.q1: How many names does the Devi Sahasranama contain?
faq.a1: It contains 1000 sacred names of the Divine Mother, each with deep spiritual significance.
faq.a2: During Navratri and Durga Puja festivals, but beneficial year-round.
faq.a3: Protection from negative energies, spiritual empowerment, and divine grace.
